title: Mildly Spicy Egyptian Lamb Wrap
description: A romantic Egyptian dish featuring tender lamb, rich tomato puree, and spicy ferment-jang, all wrapped in a delicate lotus leaf, perfect for a low-carb dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, and paprika
Add the lamb strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Let the lamb marinate for at least 30 minutes
Wrap each lamb strip in a lotus leaf, leaving a small overlap to seal the leaf
Place the wrapped lamb on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes
While the lamb is baking, heat the tomato puree and ferment-jang in a small saucepan over medium heat
Stir the sauce constantly until it is warm and fragrant
To serve, place a baked lamb wrap on each plate and spoon the tomato puree sauce over the top
